name: zacian
flavor_texts: Known as a legendary hero, this Pokémon absorbs metal particles, transforming them into a weapon it uses to battle.
This Pokémon has slumbered for many years. Some say it’s Zamazenta’s elder sister—others say the two Pokémon are rivals.
text: Zacian is the Warrior Pokémon. It is a fairy-type Pokémon. Abilities: intrepid-sword. Base stats — HP: 92, Attack: 120, Defense: 115, Sp. Atk: 80, Sp. Def: 115, Speed: 138. Evolution line: zacian. Lore: Known as a legendary hero, this Pokémon absorbs metal particles, transforming them into a weapon it uses to battle. This Pokémon has slumbered for many years. Some say it’s Zamazenta’s elder sister—others say the two Pokémon are rivals.
